steps.digest: Divide the output into a number of discrete steps
steps.label: Steps

displayName.digest: DEPRECATED: Use the lower case 'displayname' instead
displayName.label: Display Name

displayname.digest: A more readable name for the parameter in an external RNBO target
displayname.label: Display Name

unit.digest: A symbol to describe the unit of the parameter in an external RNBO target
unit.label: Unit

tonormalized.digest: Converts a real parameter value to its normalized form
tonormalized.label: To Normalized Expression

fromnormalized.digest: Converts a normalized parameter into its actual parameter value
fromnormalized.label: From Normalized Expression

order.digest: Order in which initial parameter values will be sent out on patcher load. The order can be numeric or symbolic ('first' and 'last')
order.label: Restore Order

displayorder.digest: Order in which parameters will show up in a list of all parameters. The order can be numeric or symbolic ('first' and 'last')
displayorder.label: Display Order

ctlin.digest: MIDI controller number to control this parameter.
ctlin.label: MIDI Controller Number.

meta.digest: A JSON formatted string containing metadata for use by the exported code
meta.label: Metadata

nopreset.digest: Do not add this value to the preset [DEPRECATED - USE @preset 0 instead].

preset.digest: Add this value to the preset.
preset.label: Include In Preset

nopreset.digest: Do not add this value to the preset [DEPRECATED - USE @preset 0 instead].

preset.digest: Add this value to the preset.
preset.label: Include In Preset

exposevoiceparams.digest: Expose per voice versions of the contained parameters (only valid in polyphonic subpatchers).

voicecontrol.digest: Chooses the way that polyphonic voices are controlled. 'simple' (or 'midi') will automatically allocate voices for 	incoming MIDI notes. Setting it to 'user' (or 'none') will switch off MIDI 	voice allocation and start with all voices unmuted.

receivemode.digest: Do receive~ objects get the signal from a send~ inside the patcher directly (without latency), or compensated (with latency, aligned with all other voices).

args.digest: Replacement args for the subpatcher, everything named #1, #2 etc. will be replaced with the according argument.

uidstyle.digest: Behavior of #0 unique ID. auto (default) means abstractions get a local UID, local: start a new local UID, parent: use the one from the parent patcher

in1.digest: signal sent to outlet with index 1

meta.label: Metadata
